review_title: Everyone should use AI Docs for any IT projects! They are good!
description: My overall experience with AI Docs is very positive. I highly recommend them to anyone who needs a reliable trustworthy developer.
author: Naoko L.
pros: This is the 3rd year using AI Docs. I cannot list only 1 thing that I like the most about AI Docs. I have so many things that I like them. They are honest, trustworthy, timely, precise, approachable, and list goes on. They update us all the time with the project statuses. They show us a to-do list and where they are on each item of the list all the time. Their work is accurate and their instruction for what they want us to do is accurate and easy to follow. They know what they can do and what they cannot (or what a system cannot), so that we (both them and us) don't have to spend extra time to figure out things. Overall, I am very happy to work with them and we will work with them continuously.
cons: I don't have anything I don't like about them. But if I have to give 1 thing, I want to work with them in the summer, not towards the end of the year. We might have worked together in the summer, if we approached them with a project earlier. Next year, we are making sure that we have a meeting in early summer so that we can work together in the summer.

review_title: AI Docs transformed our customer contracts and reduced our risk for obsolete inventory
description: Ai Docs has given our sales and management team the confidence in not only performing our contract related tasks using the built in Signature Workflow; but it has helped us in the area of cost avoidance for potential unsold custom materials. We estimate Ai Docs has helped us avoid over $1million in inventory write-offs.
author: MaryAnn G.
pros: AI Docs is the only signature document process that not only manages the signature process electronically, but allows us at our specified intervals have reminders and tasks to review and manage throughout the term of the contract. No other systems we reviewed could provide us with an intelligent process to manage the documents beyond the point of signature.
cons: Any opportunities for improvement have been addressed and a prompt solution has been provided for feedback we have given.

description: A slam dunk solution, helping transform our business
author: David M.
pros: A customized solution that has transformed an area of our business that carries the highest "risk/reward" from a financial perspective
cons: Nothing comes to mind. The outcome has 100% matched the purpose for implementation

description: Produces a great framework for letters of recommendation and every letter is different. Can pull info from resumes, documents or spreadsheets to provide an overall view of a student's strengths. Easy to tailor the format and body of the letter. Highly recommend!
author: Angel M.
pros: Ease of use with step by step instructions Tutorial video provides guidance in simple terms Customer service and quick response to questions Excellent letters with a personal feel Editing abilities to make the letter "your own"
cons: Some teachers are intimidated by the technology Additional larger group training would be beneficial

author: Esther C.
pros: The design process was easy and intuitive. Ron takes great care in understanding business needs and translating them into specific design questions.
cons: No real issues with working with AI Docs.

author: Jeff C.
pros: The robust letters of recommendation that we are able to write for students while still allowing editing capabilities to make sure the letters are relevant and authentic!
cons: I have not found anything that I do not like yet!

author: Riki S.
pros: [sensitive content hidden] and his team are wonderful to work with. [sensitive content hidden] is an excellent listener and picks up very quick on what my firm needed.
cons: Nothing I can think of. They did a great job.
